jd_text: Company Description Monfi Digital Bank is a forward-thinking financial institution specializing in digital banking services. Capitalizing on cutting-edge technologies and innovation, Monfi Digital Bank aims to revolutionize how individuals and businesses manage their finances in the crypto and digital currency ecosystem. Based in WP, Kuala Lumpur, the organization offers secure, seamless, and user-friendly financial solutions tailored to meet the modern-day needs of its customers. Committed to excellence and progress, Monfi Digital Bank prides itself on fostering a dynamic, technology-driven culture that leads in the financial industry. Role Description This is a full-time, on-site Chief Executive Officer role located in WP, Kuala Lumpur. As the CEO, you will provide strategic leadership for Monfi Digital Bank, ensuring operational excellence while steering the organization’s vision in the rapidly evolving world of crypto finance. Responsibilities include planning and executing high-level strategies, overseeing daily operations, managing corporate finances, driving business growth initiatives, and establishing partnerships within the crypto and financial-services ecosystem. Delivering organizational goals and ensuring alignment with regulatory and industry standards will be a top priority. Qualifications Strong background in Finance, including budget management, financial planning, and financial performance tracking Proven expertise in Operations Management and Business Planning to ensure streamlined processes and efficient workflows Proficiency in Strategic Planning and Sales, with a demonstrated ability to identify growth opportunities and build client-focused strategies Exceptional leadership and decision-making capabilities, with experience in leading diverse, high-performing teams Solid knowledge of the digital and crypto-banking landscape, including regulatory and compliance frameworks Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Business Administration, Finance, Economics, or a related field Outstanding communication, negotiation, and stakeholder management skills Experience in fostering innovation and adapting to rapid changes in technology
